nation: Fort Good Hope Dene Community Council
economic_notes: KGDC owns 24.9% of Sahtu Dene Inn Limited Partnership which operates the Sahtu Dene Inn (formerly Mackenzie Valley Hotel Ltd.) in Norman Wells, NT. Council was unsuccessful in bid to renew Airport Operations and Maintenance contract subsequent to year-end. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED - payroll records for April 1 to December 31, 2020 were unavailable. Fiscal year is 2021 not 2024 as per the document. Province is NT (Northwest Territories). KGDC is fully consolidated subsidiary; Sahtu Dene Inn Limited Partnership is a GBE accounted for on modified equity basis through KGDC. Equity in loss from GBE was -65759 for 2021. Prior period adjustment related to omitted investment in Sahtu Hotel and Conference Centre Limited Partnership. Deferred revenue of 318351 included in net debt calculation. Only one elected official remuneration disclosed (Chief Wilfred McNeely Jr. at $60,307 salary). OSR calculated as total revenue minus identifiable government transfers (AANDC Band Support 411296 + GNWT Transport 90000 + AANDC Summer Work 61820 = 563116; OSR = 962683 - 563116 = 399567 which includes deferred revenue recognized). Net financial assets is negative (net debt) at -173782.
